---
title: "Fiona Houser"
image: IMG_0177.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
  - icon: github
    text: Github
    href: https://github.com/fhouser7
  - icon: linkedin
    text: Linkedin
    href: www.linkedin.com/in/fiona-houser-50a4b0353
---

My name is Fiona Houser, and this is my personal website/portfolio made for GEOG 490. I am a fourth year student at the University of Oregon, double majoring in Spatial Data Science (SDS) and Spanish. I have completed course work using Python, CSS, C, Javascript, HTML, R, RStudio, Mapbox, and ArcGIS Online.

In the case study I perform, linked above, I analyze demographic change over time in the Portland-Vancouver-Hillsboro core-based statistical area (CBSA). To create the figures shown, I used RStudio to work with census data, analyzing and visualizing specific variables.

I previously worked as an AI/Tech intern at SunshineOxygen in Barcelona, Spain. I spent much of my time at the company developing a generative AI algorithm (GAIA) that produced synthetic hydrology and weather data. This GAIA was used to create a powerful model for disaster forecasting and event planning. 

I have completed mapping projects using ArcGIS, R and RStudio, as
I am interested in this mapping research subject and this mapping research subject. I have completed research projects in XY and Z. I hope to work in XY and Z. 

To learn more about Quarto websites visit <https://quarto.org/docs/websites>.
